ERROR.TAB_ERROR_MESSAGE: This tab encountered an unexpected error. Close it and try reopening the request. If the error repeats, the request file may be corrupt.
ERROR.PANEL_ERROR_MESSAGE: This panel encountered an unexpected error. Restart Bruno to recover.
ERROR.FOLDER_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE: This can happen when the folder was renamed or deleted on your filesystem.
ERROR.EXAMPLE_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE: This can occur when the example definition in your local file has been deleted or updated.
ERROR.REQUEST_NOT_FOUND_MESSAGE: This can happen when the file associated with this request was deleted on your filesystem.

WELCOME.ABOUT_BRUNO: Opensource IDE for exploring and testing APIs
WELCOME.COLLECTION_IMPORT_ERROR: An error occurred while importing the collection. Check the logs for more information.
WELCOME.COLLECTION_OPEN_ERROR: An error occurred while opening the collection
WELCOME.GLOBAL_SEARCH_TIP_PART3: (windows) anytime to quickly search collections, folders, and requests
WELCOME.TAGLINE: A fast, Git-friendly, and open-source API client.
WELCOME.FILESYSTEM_ONLY_DESC: Collections are plain files on your disk. No cloud sync, no proprietary lock-in.
WELCOME.GIT_FRIENDLY_DESC: Every request is a readable file. Commit, branch, review, and collaborate using the tools you already know.
WELCOME.PRIVACY_FOCUSED_DESC: No account, no login. Bruno works entirely offline, your API keys never leave your machine.
WELCOME.FAST_AND_LIGHTWEIGHT_DESC: Built to be snappy. No bloated runtimes, just a fast, focused tool for exploring and testing APIs.
WELCOME.CHOOSE_THEME_DESC: Pick a look that feels right. You can always change this later in Preferences.
WELCOME.STORAGE_QUESTION: Where should we store your collections?
WELCOME.STORAGE_DESC: Bruno saves collections as plain files on your filesystem, perfect for version control with Git.
WELCOME.STORAGE_LOCATION_HINT: Each collection and workspace gets its own folder inside this directory. You can change this later.
WELCOME.ALL_SET_DESC: Create a new collection to start building requests, or import one you already have.
WELCOME.START_FRESH: Start fresh with a new API collection
WELCOME.BRING_IN: Bring in Postman, OpenAPI/Swagger, or Insomnia
WELCOME.OPEN_EXISTING_DESC: Open a Bruno collection from your filesystem
WELCOME.GET_STARTED_REQUEST_DESC: Jump right in with a new HTTP request

SIDEBAR.ERROR_OPENING_COLLECTION: An error occurred while opening the collection
SIDEBAR.ERROR_CREATING_REQUEST: An error occurred while creating the request
SIDEBAR.ERROR_PASTING_ITEM: An error occurred while pasting the item
SIDEBAR.INFO_FOLDER_NAME: The name of the folder on your filesystem.

SIDEBAR.FOLDER_NAME_HELP: The name of the folder used to store the collection.

SIDEBAR.ERROR_CREATING_COLLECTION: An error occurred while creating the collection -

SIDEBAR.REMOVE_COLLECTION_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to close following collection in Bruno?

SIDEBAR.ERROR_REMOVING_COLLECTION: An error occurred while removing the collection
SIDEBAR.UNSAVED_CHANGES: You have unsaved changes in {{count}} request(s).
SIDEBAR.TRANSIENT_REQUESTS_HINT: These requests need to be saved individually before closing the collection.
SIDEBAR.PLEASE_SAVE_TRANSIENT_FIRST: Please save or discard transient requests first
SIDEBAR.DELETE_COLLECTION_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to permanently delete "{{name}}"?

SIDEBAR.ERROR_RENAMING_COLLECTION: An error occurred while renaming the collection
SIDEBAR.STANDALONE_HTML: Standalone HTML file - no server required
SIDEBAR.HOST_ANYWHERE: Host on any static file server
SIDEBAR.COLLECTION_NOT_AVAILABLE: Collection not found. It may have been deleted or is no longer available.
SIDEBAR.GENERATE_DOCS_DESC: Generate a standalone HTML file that can be hosted anywhere or shared with your team.
SIDEBAR.DOCS_CDN_NOTE: The generated file loads OpenCollection's JavaScript and CSS files from a CDN, which requires an internet connection.
SIDEBAR.SAVE_CHANGES_CONFIRM: Do you want to save changes you made to the following collection(s)?
SIDEBAR.COLLECTIONS_WILL_BE_REMOVED: Collections will be removed from the current workspace but will still be available in the file system and can be re-opened later.
SIDEBAR.CLOSE_ALL_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to close all {{count}} collections in this workspace?
SIDEBAR.CLOSE_COLLECTION_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to close the collection {{name}} from this workspace?
SIDEBAR.ERROR_CLOSING_COLLECTIONS: An error occurred while closing collections
SIDEBAR.ERROR_SAVING_CHANGES: An error occurred while saving changes
SIDEBAR.CLOSE_WORKSPACE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to close workspace {{name}}?
SIDEBAR.WORKSPACE_WILL_BE_AVAILABLE: It will still be available in the file system at the above location and can be re-opened later.
SIDEBAR.ERROR_CLOSING_WORKSPACE: An error occurred while closing the workspace
SIDEBAR.BRUNO_STORES_ON_DISK: Bruno stores your collections on your computer's filesystem.
SIDEBAR.CHOOSE_LOCATION: Choose the location where you want to store this collection.
SIDEBAR.CHOOSE_FILE_FORMAT: Choose the file format for storing requests in this collection.
SIDEBAR.BRU_FORMAT: BRU: Bruno's native file format (.bru files)
SIDEBAR.FILESYSTEM_NAME_HELP: You can choose to save the folder as a different name on your file system versus what is displayed in the app.
SIDEBAR.FOLDERNAME_ENVIRONMENTS_RESERVED: The folder name "environments" at the root of the collection is reserved in bruno
SIDEBAR.ERROR_ADDING_FOLDER: An error occurred while adding the folder

SIDEBAR.RESERVED_NAMES: The file names "collection" and "folder" are reserved in bruno
SIDEBAR.ERROR_CLONING_REQUEST: An error occurred while cloning the request
SIDEBAR.DELETE_ITEM_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
SIDEBAR.DELETE_EXAMPLE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete the example {{name}}?
SIDEBAR.PLEASE_CHECK_URL: Please check the URL and try again
SIDEBAR.FOLDER_RUN_DESC: This will only run the requests in this folder.
SIDEBAR.RECURSIVE_RUN_DESC: This will run all the requests in this folder and all its subfolders.
SIDEBAR.REQUESTS_LOADING_WARNING: Requests in this folder are still loading.
SIDEBAR.RUN_ALREADY_IN_PROGRESS: A Collection Run is already in progress.
SIDEBAR.DROP_FILES_TO_IMPORT: Drop file(s) to import or choose file(s)
SIDEBAR.SUPPORTS_FORMATS: Supports Bruno, OpenCollection, Postman, Insomnia, OpenAPI 3.x / Swagger 2.0, WSDL, and ZIP formats
SIDEBAR.ZIP_NOT_VALID: The ZIP file is not a valid Bruno collection
SIDEBAR.FAILED_TO_PARSE_FILE: Failed to parse the file – ensure it is valid JSON or YAML
SIDEBAR.NO_VALID_COLLECTIONS: No valid collections found in the selected files
SIDEBAR.CANNOT_MIX_ZIP: Cannot mix ZIP files with other file types. Please select either a single ZIP file OR collection files (JSON/YAML)
SIDEBAR.MULTIPLE_ZIP_SELECTED: Multiple ZIP files selected. Please select only one ZIP file at a time for import.
SIDEBAR.INVALID_GIT_URL: Please enter a valid git repository URL
SIDEBAR.ENTER_URL_PLACEHOLDER: Enter URL (OpenAPI/Swagger, Postman, or Insomnia specification)
SIDEBAR.URL_IMPORT_FAILED: URL import failed. Please check the URL and try again.
SIDEBAR.THIS_MAY_TAKE_A_MOMENT: This may take a moment depending on the collection size
SIDEBAR.GROUP_BY_TAGS: Tags: Group requests by OpenAPI/Swagger tags
SIDEBAR.GROUP_BY_PATHS: Paths: Group requests by URL path structure
SIDEBAR.FOLDER_ARRANGEMENT_DESC: Select whether to create folders according to the spec's paths or tags.
SIDEBAR.OPENAPI_SYNC_NOT_SWAGGER2: OpenAPI Sync is not supported for Swagger 2.0 specs.
SIDEBAR.STAY_NOTIFIED_OF_SPEC: Stay notified of spec changes and sync your collection with the spec.
SIDEBAR.SELECT_LOCATION: Select a location to save the collection
SIDEBAR.GLOBAL_ENV_HELP: Environments will be imported and stored as global, accessible across collections.
SIDEBAR.DUPLICATE_ENV_HELP: Each imported collection will receive its own copy of the environments.
SIDEBAR.NO_BRUNO_COLLECTIONS_FOUND: No Bruno collections were found in this repository.

SIDEBAR.PERPETUAL_LICENSE_ORG: perpetual license with 2 years of updates

REQUEST_PANE.UNABLE_TO_PRETTIFY_JSON: Unable to prettify. Invalid JSON format.
REQUEST_PANE.UNABLE_TO_PRETTIFY_XML: Unable to prettify. Invalid XML format.
REQUEST_PANE.NAME: Name
REQUEST_PANE.PATH_VARIABLES_HELP: Path variables are automatically added whenever the :name template is used in the URL. For example: https://example.com/v1/users/{:id}
REQUEST_PANE.HEADER_NAME_NO_SPACES: Header name cannot contain spaces or newlines
REQUEST_PANE.ENTER_URL_OR_CURL: Enter URL or paste a cURL request
REQUEST_PANE.HEAD: HEAD
REQUEST_PANE.VARIABLE_INVALID_CHARS: Variable contains invalid characters. Must only contain alphanumeric characters, "-", "_", "."
REQUEST_PANE.WRITE_JS_EXPR_HERE: You can write any valid JS expression here
REQUEST_PANE.OAUTH_FILE_REF_ADD_FILE: File references should be added using the "Upload File" button below
REQUEST_PANE.BODY_PLACEMENT_WARNING: Body placement requires a form-urlencoded body. Non-form payloads will be replaced with OAuth parameters.
REQUEST_PANE.AUTO_FETCH_TOKEN: Automatically fetch token if not found
REQUEST_PANE.AUTO_FETCH_TOKEN_HELP: Automatically fetch a new token when you try to access a resource and don't have one.
REQUEST_PANE.AUTO_REFRESH_TOKEN_HELP: Automatically refresh your token using the refresh URL when it expires.
REQUEST_PANE.NO_ACCESS_TOKEN_RECEIVED: No access token received from authorization server
REQUEST_PANE.ERROR_FETCHING_TOKEN: An error occurred while fetching token!
REQUEST_PANE.ERROR_REFRESHING_TOKEN: An error occurred while refreshing token!
REQUEST_PANE.ERROR_FETCHING_TOKEN_DETAILS: Error fetching token. Check network logs for more details.
REQUEST_PANE.ERROR_PRETTIFYING_QUERY: Error occurred while prettifying GraphQL query
REQUEST_PANE.NO_SCHEMA_LOADED_DESC: Load a GraphQL schema to explore operations and build queries visually.
REQUEST_PANE.MULTIPLE_OPERATIONS_DESC: The Query Builder supports a single operation at a time. Combine into one operation to sync.
REQUEST_PANE.QUERY_BUILDER_ERROR: The Query Builder encountered an unexpected error. Try reloading the schema or manually using the editor.
REQUEST_PANE.ENTER_VALID_WS_URL: Please enter a valid WebSocket URL
REQUEST_PANE.KEEP_ALIVE_HELP: Keep the websocket alive by sending ping requests to the server at every interval (in milliseconds)
REQUEST_PANE.TIMEOUT_VALID_NUMBER: Timeout needs to be a valid number

REQUEST_PANE.INHERITED_AUTH_WS_NOT_SUPPORTED: Inherited auth not supported by WebSockets. Using no auth instead.
REQUEST_PANE.INHERITED_AUTH_GRPC_NOT_SUPPORTED: Inherited auth not supported by gRPC. Using no auth instead.
REQUEST_PANE.NO_METHODS_FOUND: No methods found for the search term
REQUEST_PANE.REFLECTION_DESC: Using server reflection to discover gRPC methods.
REQUEST_PANE.LOADED_METHODS_FROM_PROTO: Loaded {{count}} gRPC methods from proto file
REQUEST_PANE.ENTER_VALID_GRPC_URL: Please enter a valid gRPC server URL

REQUEST_PANE.FAILED_TO_BROWSE_IMPORT_DIR: Failed to browse for import directory: {{message}}

REQUEST_PANE.NO_IMPORT_PATHS_CONFIGURED: No import paths configured in collection settings

REQUEST_PANE.MAX_REDIRECTS_DESC: Set a limit for the number of redirects to follow
REQUEST_PANE.TIMEOUT_MS_DESC: Set maximum time to wait before aborting the request
REQUEST_PANE.CONFIGURE_REQUEST_SETTINGS: Configure request settings for this item.

RESPONSE_PANE.NO_MESSAGES_ERROR_DISMISSED: No messages received. A server error occurred but has been dismissed.

RESPONSE_PANE.NO_PREVIEW_DESC: Sorry, no preview is available for this content type.

RESPONSE_PANE.RESPONSE_EXCEEDS_5MB: Response size exceeds 5MB limit. Cannot save as example.
RESPONSE_PANE.NO_VALID_RESPONSE: No valid response to save as example

RESPONSE_PANE.PROXY_NOT_APPLICABLE: Proxy enabled but not applicable for this request

PREFERENCES_PAGE.BROWSE_DEFAULT_LOCATION: Click to browse for default location

POSTMAN_PACKAGE.NPM_NOT_FOUND: npm was not found on your PATH. Install Node.js/npm, then retry or run the command manually.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.TIMEOUT: npm install timed out. Try running the command manually in a terminal.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.SPAWN_FAILED: Could not start npm install. Try running the command manually.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.INSTALL_FAILED: npm install failed (exit code {{exitCode}}). Try the manual command above.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.INSTALL_FAILED_DETAIL: npm install failed. See details below.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND: Could not locate the imported collection to switch modes.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.PACKAGES_HELP: These npm packages are referenced by scripts in your imported collection but aren't installed in this collection's folder.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.NEEDS_DEV_MODE: Scripts use libraries that need Developer Mode
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.NEEDS_DEV_MODE_DESC: Your imported scripts call {{packages}}, which need Developer Mode to run.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.TRUST_WARNING: Only enable Developer Mode for collections you trust.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.NOT_SUPPORTED_DESC: Postman-specific packages without a Bruno equivalent. Scripts that call these will fail at runtime.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.RUNS_DEV_MODE: This collection runs in Developer Mode - your scripts can use these packages right away.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.SAFE_MODE_WARNING: Custom npm packages (such as {{packages}}) are installed, but this collection is currently running in Safe Mode.
POSTMAN_PACKAGE.NO_PATH: Cannot install: collection path not available.

IMPORT_ISSUES.TITLE: Imported with issues: {{summary}}
IMPORT_ISSUES.HINT: Open DevTools console to see which items failed and why.
IMPORT_ISSUES.INCLUDE_FAILED_DATA_DESC: Attaches the raw Postman request items that failed. May contain API keys, tokens, or internal URLs.
IMPORT_ISSUES.URL_TOO_LONG: Issue details are too long to embed in the URL. Clicking "Report on GitHub" will copy them to your clipboard — paste it once the GitHub issue page opens.

OVERVIEW.NO_COLLECTIONS_YET_DESC: Create your first collection or open an existing one to get started.
